text:
was a man residing in Stohess District. He was the boyfriend of Carly Stratmann and a minor character appearing in the story "Wall Sina, Goodbye" of the Attack on Titan: Lost Girls novel and the manga of the same name.

Appearance

Wayne was a young man with a sunken in face and a thin frame. He had scraggly, unkempt black hair and a thin goatee. He wore common black pants and a white button down shirt.

Personality

Wayne was a greedy man and used a variety of immoral tactics in order to gain money.

Story

Wall Sheena, Goodbye arc

At some point in time, Wayne became Carly Stratmann's lover. When Carly started producing an illegal drug known as coderoin Wayne became involved as a drug dealer and hid the drug under his bed. Using a license for a hired carriage, he was able to transport the drug into the royal capital if he hid the drug in the cargo.

When Carly decided she wanted to run away, he let her live with him for several days and agreed to leave town with her. However, Wayne was not interested in living with Carly in poverty. Two thugs, Wald Richter and Lou Meade find Wayne while they are looking for Carly. Wayne decides to betray Carly and makes a deal with the two thugs to hold Carly for ransom. He planned on blackmailing Carly's father, Elliot G. Stratmann using Carly's involvement in the drug trade. The two thugs agreed and locked Carly up at Wald's office. They then met with Elliot and negotiated a handoff date.

In the days leading up to the handoff, Wayne kept an eye on the Stratmann estate, when one day he noticed a Military Police officer, Annie Leonhart, visit the estate. Wayne became worried that if the Military Police investigated Elliot that he would be found out so he left a note for Elliot outside his door, telling Elliot to bring money to Wayne's house in exchange for his daughter back. Wayne then jumped over the gates of the estate and was spotted by Annie.

Elliot goes to Wayne's apartment and the two have some drinks while they talk. Elliot determines that Wayne has no intention of returning Carly and only wishes to get Elliot drunk and steal his money. Elliot kills Wayne and hides his corpse underneath Wayne's bed. Later, during the day, Annie searches Wayne's apartment and discovers his corpse.

Later, during the night, Annie confronts Elliot about Wayne's death. After Elliot admits to Wayne's murder, Annie and Elliot take Wayne's corpse to a liquid waste storage facility and dispose of it in a vat of sludge.

Relationships

Carly Stratmann - Wayne was Carly's lover. When Carly decided she wanted to run away, he let her live with him for several days and agreed to leave town with her. However, Wayne was not interested in living with Carly in poverty and later made a deal with two thugs to hold Carly for ransom.
